Jordan Smith
Phoenix, AZ

Summary
Detail-oriented and efficient Picker/Packer with over 4 years of experience in fast-paced warehouse environments. Proven ability to handle heavy lifting and maintain accuracy in picking and packing tasks. Committed to meeting productivity goals while ensuring quality standards are met.

Experience

Warehouse Associate
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operate in a fast-paced warehouse setting, responsible for picking and packing orders accurately and efficiently.  
- Consistently meet or exceed daily productivity targets while ensuring high attention to detail.  
- Lift and move packages weighing up to 50 lbs throughout the shift, demonstrating physical endurance and strength.  
- Collaborate with team members to optimize workflow and maintain safety standards in the warehouse.  

Picker/Packer  
XYZ Distribution, Scottsdale, AZ  
March 2019 - May 2021  
- Handled the picking and packing of orders for a variety of products in a busy distribution center.  
- Maintained a clean and organized work area to enhance efficiency and safety.  
- Utilized warehouse management systems to track inventory and ensure accurate order fulfillment.  
- Assisted in training new employees on safety protocols and efficient packing techniques.
